since_last: 47% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.73%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.55% · BTC -0.34% · Gold +0.83% · Nasdaq100 -0.74%. 47% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.73%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.73%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.61%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +7.74%, MU +4.89%, LEU +3.97%, ORCL +3.12%, ARM +2.68%. Laggards: ISRG -12.61%, PUBM -5.50%, SNAP -4.80%, SPCX -4.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.34% at $125.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
